ItacWorkItem.Pagination: pp. 331 plus 5 unnumbered at the end
ItacWorkItem.Notes: It contains emblems dedicated to Academia dei Gelati and Academia degli Ardenti; for details on the engraver see Praz Studies in seventeenth-century imagery (Rome 1975). Images displayed include title-page and emblem dedicated to Accademia degli Ardenti. Author`s Protesta: Sicubi fata, fortem, fortunam, et Numen, Deos, Deas, Coelum, idque; generis verba repereris, Christiano ritu interpreteris, ita enim a recta pietate non deerraveris.
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: D. Homobonus de Bonis Poenitentiarius pro Illustriss. Et Reverendiss. Card. Archiepiscopo | Imprimatur | Fr. Hieronymus Onuphrius Romanus Doctor Collegiatus Lector Publicus ac Sanctiss. Inquisitionis Consultor pro Reverendiss. P. Inquisit. Bonon.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
